Article Title: Lionel Messi exits FIFA World Cup in tears and as football's greatest
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi (10) during the World Cup final match between Spain and Argentina in East Rutherford, N.J., near New York, Sunday, July 19, 2026. (AP Photo)

Tears rolled down Lionel Messi 's face as he walked away with a silver medal around his neck. Spain had beaten Argentina 1-0 after extra time in the FIFA World Cup final, ending the defending champions' title defence and what could well be the last World Cup appearance of the greatest footballer the game has seen.Twenty years after making his World Cup debut, the 39-year-old could not produce one more miracle. Argentina, chasing back-to-back World Cup titles, were outplayed by Spain for long periods at MetLife Stadium, where 80,663 spectators had largely turned up hoping to watch their Messi-ah lift the trophy once again.Instead, it was Spain celebrating their second World Cup title.Ferran Torres scored just 37 seconds into the second half of extra time to settle the final after Spain had dominated the contest from the opening whistle. As Spanish players celebrated, Messi stood with his teammates, struggling to hold back tears while Argentina's supporters applauded them from the stands.Messi, head bowed, hands on his hips, watched 19-year-old Lamine Yamal embrace Torres after the winning goal. Moments later, with tears running down his cheeks, he collected his runners-up medal while Spain celebrated amid confetti and fireworks."I hope that everyone feels proud of him, of what he’s achieved because he’s the best football player ever stepping foot on a pitch," Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni said after the match.The statistics reflected Spain's dominance in the final. Luis de la Fuente's side outshot Argentina 20-2 and completed 845 passes to Argentina's 433. According to Opta, the 18-shot difference was the second biggest in a World Cup final since records began in 1966, behind only West Germany's 23-1 shot advantage over Argentina in the 1990 final.Spain also succeeded where few teams have ever managed to -- they kept Messi quiet."The first idea was to keep Messi at bay," Spain coach Luis de la Fuente said.Messi managed only 15 touches in the first half and finished with 54 touches in the match. He never found the space to create the moments that had carried Argentina through the tournament. His passes into dangerous areas failed to connect and he rarely received the ball in positions from where he could threaten Spain's defence.That had not been the story of Argentina's campaign until the final.After leaving European football for Major League Soccer three years ago, some questioned whether Messi's best days were behind him. Instead, he led Argentina back to another World Cup final with eight goals and four assists.His eight goals helped Argentina through the group stage and knockout rounds. Against England in the semifinal, he set up both goals in a stoppage-time victory. Against Egypt, with Argentina trailing 2-0 and facing elimination, he provided the cross for the first goal before scoring the equaliser himself.Throughout the tournament, Messi once again showed his ability to influence matches despite covering less ground than his teammates. He walked for nearly half the time he spent on the pitch, averaging around five kilometres per game, conserving energy before producing bursts of quality whenever Argentina needed him.Against Spain, though, that moment never arrived.If this was his last, then Messi ends his World Cup career with 21 goals, a record that stood until France's Kylian Mbappe scored twice in the third-place playoff to move to 22. He also became the first player to start three World Cup finals and has 125 international goals, second only to Cristiano Ronaldo's 146.His achievements extend far beyond statistics.World Cup winner in 2022. Consecutive Copa América titles. Four UEFA Champions League trophies. Twelve league titles across spells with Barcelona and Paris Saint-Germain, only player in football history to win 8 Ballon d'Or awards. A career that placed him alongside Diego Maradona and Pelé in football's greatest-ever debates.As the final whistle blew, Spanish players queued up to console him. Several hugged him before Argentina collected their silver medals. When Spain formed a guard of honour for the runners-up, Messi tried to smile but could not. His expression barely changed as opponents patted him on the back while he walked to the podium.If this was indeed his final appearance on football's biggest stage, it ended without the fairytale finish many had hoped for.It was not because Messi failed to try. Spain simply gave him no room to operate. Their Rodri-led midfield controlled possession, limited Argentina's attacks and prevented Messi from dictating the game the way he had done throughout the tournament.The final may not have delivered the ending he wanted, but it does little to change how his career will be remembered.It may not have been the ending Messi imagined. It may not even be the end. Whether this proves to be Messi's final World Cup appearance or not will become clear only when he decides. But if this was the last image of him on football's biggest stage, it was one of tears, not triumph.However, the defeat in New Jersey cannot undo a career that has already secured its place among the greatest the sport has known. If this is to be his tearful sign off, fans will still look back at having been blessed by football's greatest of all time.
Article Summary: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 after extra time in the FIFA World Cup final. Ferran Torres scored just 37 seconds into the second half of extra time to settle the final. Argentina, chasing back-to-back World Cup titles, were outplayed by Spain for long periods.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup 2026 awards: Full winners list as Rodri, Mbappe claim top honours
Article Text:
L-R: Spain's Pau Cubarsi, Rodri and goalkeeper Unai Simon pose with their individual awards. (AP Photo)

Mbappe wins Golden Boot despite France's semifinal exit



Full list of FIFA World Cup 2026 award winners



Golden Ball: Rodri (Spain)

Silver Ball: Lionel Messi (Argentina)

Bronze Ball: Kylian Mbappe (France)

Golden Boot: Kylian Mbappe (France)

Silver Boot: Lionel Messi (Argentina)

Bronze Boot: Jude Bellingham (England)

Golden Glove: Unai Simon (Spain)

FIFA Young Player Award: Pau Cubarsi (Spain)

FIFA Fair Play Trophy: The Netherlands

Spain's historic FIFA World Cup 2026 triumph was reflected in the tournament's individual honours as Rodri, Unai Simon and Pau Cubarsi swept three of the biggest awards, while France captain Kylian Mbappe claimed the Golden Boot after another sensational goalscoring campaign.Following Spain's 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina in the final at MetLife Stadium, FIFA announced the winners of its prestigious post-tournament awards, recognising the standout performers of the biggest World Cup in history.Rodri was named the recipient of the Golden Ball after producing a series of commanding displays in midfield throughout Spain's unbeaten title-winning run. The Manchester City midfielder dictated the tempo in almost every game and capped off a remarkable tournament by helping La Roja secure their second FIFA World Cup crown.Goalkeeper Unai Simon added another trophy to Spain's celebrations after winning the Golden Glove Award. Simon was the backbone of Spain's formidable defence, keeping seven clean sheets in eight matches as the champions conceded just one goal throughout the tournament. He also set a World Cup record by going 650 consecutive minutes without conceding.Teenage sensation Pau Cubarsi completed Spain's awards sweep by winning the FIFA Best Young Player Award.The 19-year-old defender emerged as one of the tournament's biggest stars with a string of composed performances at the heart of Spain's defence, playing a crucial role in the team's record-setting defensive campaign.France captain Kylian Mbappe once again finished as the tournament's leading scorer, collecting the Golden Boot after scoring 10 goals in eight matches.Although France fell short of reaching a third consecutive World Cup final, Mbappe's remarkable campaign saw him become the first player to win the World Cup Golden Boot in back-to-back editions. He also extended his record as the highest goalscorer in men's FIFA World Cup history with 22 career goals.Meanwhile, the Netherlands were presented with the FIFA Fair Play Award in recognition of their exemplary discipline and sportsmanship throughout the competition.Spain capped a memorable tournament by defeating defending champions Argentina 1-0 after extra time in the final, with substitute Ferran Torres scoring the decisive goal in the 106th minute. The victory secured Spain's second FIFA World Cup title and completed a near-perfect campaign, with La Roja conceding just one goal across eight matches while dominating both the team and individual honours.
Article Summary: FIFA announce the winners of its prestigious post-tournament awards. Spain's historic FIFA World Cup 2026 triumph was reflected in the tournament's individual honours. Rodri, Unai Simon and Pau Cubarsi swept three of the biggest awards. France captain Kylian Mbappe claimed the Golden Boot after another sensational goalscoring campaign.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys eye blockbuster move for Miami Dolphins $10 Million All-Pro
Article Text:
The Dallas Cowboys continue to be linked with Miami Dolphins linebacker Jordyn Brooks after ESPN's Bill Barnwell valued the All-Pro at a second or third-round pick. Brooks, entering the final year of his contract, has emerged as a potential target as Dallas looks to strengthen its defense. The move could provide the Cowboys with a proven playmaker while giving Miami valuable draft capital for the future.

Category Details Player Jordyn Brooks Current Team Miami Dolphins Rumored Team Dallas Cowboys Contract Status Final year of three-year contract Salary Cap Hit Approximately $8.375 million in 2026 Trade Likelihood Moderate Latest Insider Update Bill Barnwell values Brooks at a second or third-round pick Potential Return Second or third-round draft selection

Which teams are interested in Jordyn Brooks?

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact both teams

The Dallas Cowboys are still connected to Miami Dolphins linebacker Jordyn Brooks, with trade talk picking up in the days before the 2026 NFL season. That led to speculation that Dallas could make another move after adding linebacker Dee Winters earlier this offseason, with ESPN’s Bill Barnwell recently estimating Brooks’ value at a second or third-round pick.Dallas has emerged as one of the most frequently mentioned destinations for Brooks. The Cowboys entered the offseason looking to strengthen a defense that struggled throughout 2025, and linebacker remains an area where the front office could still make an upgrade.The team recently acquired Dee Winters from the San Francisco 49ers, but Brooks would represent a much bigger addition. With DeMarvion Overshown's career repeatedly interrupted by injuries, Dallas may prefer a proven veteran who has stayed on the field.Trade chatter has followed Brooks for months. In June, Bleacher Report's Gary Davenport proposed a deal that would send a 2027 second-round pick and a 2028 fourth-round pick to Miami in exchange for Brooks and a 2028 fifth-round selection."(The Cowboys) have been wildly aggressive trying to bolster a defense that was the NFL's worst last year," Davenport wrote. "There are two new edge-rushers in veteran Rashan Gary and rookie Malachi Lawrence, two new starters at safety and a new linebacker in Dee Winters.However, while Winters is a capable pro, he's not the same caliber of player Brooks is. The Cowboys are perpetually all-in on a Super Bowl run, trading for Brooks would be a nice finish to the team's defensive makeover. "Barnwell believes Brooks' trade value is lower than many would expect despite his elite production."I had (Dolphins center) Aaron Brewer and Brooks on my first-team All-Pro roster in 2025, but they both play relatively undervalued positions and are already in their peak seasons as 28-year-olds," Barnwell wrote.His valuation has only strengthened the belief that Dallas could realistically complete a deal if it chooses to pursue one.Brooks signed a three-year, $26.25 million contract with Miami before the 2024 season. He is entering the final year of that deal and is scheduled to earn roughly $8.375 million in 2026.The linebacker has been one of the NFL's most reliable defenders, missing only two regular-season games since 2021. He led the league with 183 tackles and 99 solo tackles in 2025."A smooth coverage linebacker with great instincts and field sense, Brooks is one of the few linebackers in the league who can truly be trusted to carry a tight end down the field, or drop into the intermediate middle and not get bamboozled by route combinations or quarterbacks' eye fakes," ESPN's Ben Solak wrote in October 2025. "Coverage linebackers in their athletic prime are rare and impactful players."A move for Brooks would give Dallas another experienced starter and provide stability at a position that has lacked consistency. It would also complete much of the defensive overhaul the Cowboys began earlier this offseason.Miami, meanwhile, would gain valuable draft capital if it decides not to extend Brooks beyond 2026. The Dolphins would have to replace one of their defensive leaders, but additional picks could help reshape the roster for the future while creating greater financial flexibility.
Article Summary: Jordyn Brooks is entering the final year of his contract with the Miami Dolphins. ESPN's Bill Barnwell valued the All-Pro linebacker at a second or third-round pick. The Cowboys entered the offseason looking to strengthen a defense that struggled throughout 2025.

Article Title: James Corden wants Prince Harry as England's next coach and his World Cup analysis might actually convince you
Article Text:
James Corden thinks Prince Harry should coach the Three Lions (Getty Images)

Prince Harry's mindset theory earns praise as James Corden floats England coaching joke



England's World Cup campaign ended with its best finish since 1966, yet the semi-final defeat to Argentina continues to spark debate over what really went wrong. While much of the criticism has focused on Thomas Tuchel's tactical approach after Anthony Gordon's opening goal, Prince Harry offered a different explanation that quickly caught attention. Instead of pointing to formations or substitutions, the Duke of Sussex argued that England lost belief at the crucial moment. His comments resonated with James Corden , who turned the discussion into a light-hearted coaching proposal that also drew Rio Ferdinand into the conversation.Speaking on James Corden's After Hours on Fox, Prince Harry suggested England's downfall had less to do with instructions from the touchline and more with how the players reacted after taking the lead.He explained: “It’s a mindset. I think what we saw was a slight shock value for the team.“Oh, s***, we’re 1-0 up against Argentina, and then there was this immediate temptation to fall into defence.“I don’t think it was a tactic, I don’t think that was the plan, it just happened. You can’t, for however long it was, try to defend a 1-0 lead against a team like that. You just can’t.“So I think the mindset is the belief. If you are 1-0 up, believe that could be 2-0 up.”The comments stood out because they shifted the discussion away from tactical diagrams and focused instead on confidence. Prince Harry argued that England's players appeared surprised by their own advantage and instinctively protected it rather than trying to extend it.That view mirrors what several former players have suggested in the days since the defeat, even if opinions remain divided over how much responsibility belongs to Tuchel.Corden clearly liked the analysis. The television host joked that Prince Harry deserved a place in England's future coaching setup, imagining a management team led by former Manchester United and England defender Rio Ferdinand once Tuchel's contract expires after Euro 2028.He said: “Once Thomas Tuchel steps down in two years’ time after the Euros, what about this? Manager, Rio Ferdinand. Assistant manager, Prince Harry.”The playful suggestion came after Ferdinand himself expressed admiration for Prince Harry's football perspective and invited him to appear on his podcast, believing they shared similar views on the game.The debate is unlikely to disappear anytime soon. England's third-place finish represented clear progress, but many supporters still believe the team missed an opportunity to reach the final. Argentina later lost to Spain in the championship match, a result that only strengthened arguments that England could have been bolder after taking the lead.Prince Harry is not someone usually associated with football analysis, but his comments touched on a question that has dominated post-tournament discussion. Whether England were undone by tactics or mentality remains open to debate, yet his argument that belief disappeared at the decisive moment has clearly found an audience.
Article Summary: Prince Harry suggested England's downfall had less to do with instructions from the touchline and more with how the players reacted after taking the lead. The Duke of Sussex argued that England lost belief at the crucial moment. His comments resonated with James Corden, who turned the discussion into a light- hearted coaching proposal.

Article Title: List of all upcoming collaborations in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3
Article Text:
Upcoming Fortnite collaborations (Image via Fortnite)

List of all upcoming Fortnite collaborations

Spider-Man: Brand New Day

Spider-Man's return to Fortnite is nearly here and it is likely tied to the theatrical release of Spider-Man: Brand New Day on July 31, 2026. The v41.20 update will deliver the Brand New Day Spider-Man skin and the Spider-Man Sprite, which is expected to introduce a brand new web-swinging Sprite Net mechanic to the game.

DC Hot Bat Summer

Although the Batman and the wider DC roster are having a full summer event already live in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3, the Hot Bat Summer event is expected to continue with additional DC content throughout the summer. Accordingly, you can expect more themed cosmetics and skins to make their way into the battle royale experience really soon.

Phantom Blade Zero

Phantom Blade Zero, which is among the most-hyped games, is all set to collaborate with Fortnite. Even though the exact date is not known yet, it could be released as part of Chapter 7 Season 3. However, there are chances that the collaboration could be pushed back, given that the game is arriving later this year in October. A crossover during the time of release would make more sense.

Ice Spice (SpongeBob)

One of the most unexpected and exciting leaks of recent weeks, a SpongeBob-themed Ice Spice skin appears to be on the horizon. Data miners have flagged signals suggesting the collaboration could arrive very soon, potentially as part of a broader SpongeBob crossover tied to Ice Spice's association with the iconic Nickelodeon property.

Tom and Jerry

Tom and Jerry are reportedly likely heading to Fortnite in the near future. The classic animated duo would be a natural fit for the island, and given that Looney Tunes - a comparable legacy animation property - already had a successful Fortnite run earlier in Chapter 7 Season 2, a Tom and Jerry crossover would follow a clear and established template.

Obsession

Epic Games has officially shared a teaser with Obsession, and it is likely that the collaboration will take place soon. However, there are chances that the skins will later be introduced during Halloween.

Hello Neighbor

The Hello Neighbor studio has publicly stated they are "looking into" a Fortnite collaboration following fan requests. While not yet confirmed, developer acknowledgements of this kind have historically been early signals for forthcoming crossovers, and a Hello Neighbor x Fortnite collaboration remains a very real possibility for later in the season.

Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 Runners is shaping up to be one of the most collaboration-rich seasons in the game's history, with several prominent figures and shows already making their way into the battle royale experience. The pipeline of incoming crossovers shows absolutely no signs of slowing down.From beloved animated characters to blockbuster gaming franchises, here is a complete rundown of every confirmed and leaked upcoming collaboration heading to the Fortnite island as part of Chapter 7 Season 3.The following are the upcoming Fortnite collaborations:This was all you needed to know about the different collaborations that will be arriving in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3.
Article Summary: Spider-Man's return to Fortnite is nearly here and it is likely tied to the theatrical release of Spider-Man: Brand New Day on July 31, 2026. A SpongeBob- themed Ice Spice skin appears to be on the horizon. The Hello Neighbor studio has publicly stated they are "looking into" a Fortnites collaboration.

Article Title: Kevin Keegan cause of death: How did former England captain and manager die?
Article Text:
Kevin Keegan dies aged 75 (Getty Images)

How did Kevin Keegan die? What was his cause of death?



What did Kevin Keegan achieve as a player and manager?



Who was Kevin Keegan beyond football?



Kevin Keegan, one of English football's most celebrated figures, has died at the age of 75. His family confirmed the news on Monday, revealing he had been fighting cancer since his diagnosis earlier this year. A double Ballon d'Or winner, a Liverpool great, the man who gave Newcastle its identity as "The Entertainers" -- Keegan leaves behind a legacy that will take generations to fully appreciate. Alan Shearer put it simply on social media: "My Hero. My manager. My friend. Sleep easy Boss."Kevin Keegan had been dealing with abdominal symptoms for some time before his family went public about his condition in January. Further medical evaluation confirmed what many feared. By June, Keegan himself disclosed that he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer, the most advanced stage, indicating the disease had spread beyond its point of origin.He passed away seven weeks after that public disclosure. A family statement confirmed he was "surrounded by his wife and daughters in his final moments." The statement described him as "a much loved husband, father and grandfather" and requested privacy during what it called "a hugely difficult time."His medical team received specific thanks in the announcement.Kevin Keegan arrived at Liverpool in 1971, signed by Bill Shankly for just £33,000 from Scunthorpe United. What followed over the next six years was the foundation of a remarkable career. He won three First Division titles, the FA Cup, two UEFA Cups, and the 1977 European Cup at Anfield. Then came Hamburg, where he won the Bundesliga and achieved something no British player had done before or since: back-to-back Ballon d'Or victories in 1978 and 1979. He remains one of only four English players to have ever won that award.At international level, Keegan scored 21 goals in 63 England appearances between 1972 and 1982. He later took the national job in February 1999, guiding England to Euro 2000. His tenure ended with a resignation following a World Cup qualifying defeat against Germany at the old Wembley.As a manager, his most impactful chapter came at Newcastle. He took the club from a relegation fight in the First Division in 1992 and turned them into Premier League contenders within four years, finishing runners-up in 1995-96. His Newcastle side played football that captivated the country. His later spells included Fulham, Manchester City (2001 to 2005), and a brief return to Newcastle in 2008.Away from the pitch, Keegan was genuinely famous in a way that modern footballers rarely experience. He was the face of Brut 33, released pop singles, and was a fixture of 1970s popular culture in Britain. His appeal went far beyond football fans.Newcastle United's tribute said Keegan's impact "will live on in the memories he created with club and country, the dreams he inspired wherever he went." Liverpool said his "indomitable spirit and remarkable contribution will be forever etched" in the club's history. Manchester City credited him with helping establish them as a Premier League club during his four years in charge.Current Newcastle head coach Eddie Howe even reached out to Keegan when he took the job in 2021, seeking insight into what it takes to succeed at the club.
Article Summary: Kevin Keegan has died at the age of 75. His family confirmed the news on Monday. He had been fighting cancer since his diagnosis earlier this year. Keegan was a double Ballon d'Or winner, a Liverpool great, and the man who gave Newcastle its identity.

Article Title: RIP Cyril Blais: Maximilian Gunther pens heartbreaking note after losing true friend
Article Text:
Maximilian Gunther and Cyril Blais (Image credit: Instagram)

Maximilian Gunther calls Cyril Blais a real racer in touching note



Formula E to pay tribute to Cyril Blais at Tokyo E-Prix



Formula E driver Maximilian Gunther has penned a heartbreaking note on the passing of his dear friend and former boss, Cyril Blais. Gunther was part of Maserati MSG Racing until last year, when Cyril Blais was the team principal. The team was renamed Citroen Racing this season, with Blais becoming the team principal, and he witnessed the team secure four podium finishes. He died this week at the age of 46.Maximilian Gunther walked down memory lane and shared some memorable pictures with Cyril Blais on Instagram.He wrote: “RIP Cyril. Devastating news and a huge loss of a true friend. Cyril was an incredibly special person, a wonderful character and real racer, always being immensely professional.”Sharing about his time with Blais, he wrote, “You knew with Cyril that he would always have your back. We achieved great success together and shared many beautiful experiences on and off the track. I‘m grateful to have worked with Cyril for three years. We began our journey together in Formula 2, where he was my chief engineer. Our paths crossed again at Maserati in Formula E, where he was my race engineer and team principal at the same time.Our relationship was built on great trust and we grew very close over the years.”“The moments and memories we created are something I will carry in my heart for the rest of my life. My thoughts are with Cyril’s family and loved ones during this incredibly difficult time. Thank you Cyril, rest in peace, my friend,” he added.Jaguar TCS Racing driver Antonio Felix da Costa reacted to the post with two red heart emojis. A fan even said, “Without Cyril's contribution, we would've never had Maximilian Gunther today.”Earlier in the day, Formula E CEO Jeff Dodds announced in a statement that the series would pay tribute to Cyril Blais at the upcoming Tokyo E-Prix. The Round 14 and Round 15 races will be held this weekend as scheduled. They will be followed by the Season 12 finale in London next month.Many other Formula E drivers and personalities from the motorsport world also condoled the death of the Citroen Racing Team Principal. FIA President Mohammed Ben Sulayem also shared his condolences.Also read: Jean-Eric Vergne makes a promise, Lucas Di Grassi recalls old days as they remember Cyril Blais
Article Summary: Cyril Blais died this week at the age of 46. Formula E driver Maximilian Gunther paid tribute to his friend and former boss. Gunther was part of Maserati MSG Racing until last year, when Blais was the team principal.

Article Title: "My plate is quite full": Shakira's emotional confession about her love life resurfaces as Gerard Piqué watched her record breaking 2026 World Cup halftime show
Article Text:
Shakira's emotional confession about her love life resurfaces. (Image via Getty Images)

Shakira opens up on if she will look for love again after her brutal break up with World Cup star Gerard Piqué

Shakira opened up about how she stands by Lionel Messi even as her children supported the Spanish team

Shakira had billions around the world dancing as her 2026 World Cup Final’s half time show broke viewership records. While the 49 year old Grammy winner looked ravishing on stage, all eyes were on her ex boyfriend and World Cup star Gerard Piqué as he watched her performance with their children. Shakira’s performance comes at a time when there have been many emotional revelations about how brutally she was cheated on by her long term ex boyfriend and the father of her two children, World Cup star Gerard Piqué.In clips that have sparked chaos, many fans are convinced that Gerard Piqué looked pretty uncomfortable as Shakira set the stage on fire, amid their brutal break up.Amid all the mess, Shakira’s confession on finding love again after she caught Gerard Piqué cheating on her has sparked chaos.A few weeks ago, in an interview with The Times’ Blanca Schofield, Shakira opened up on dating as she said, “Oh no, no romance for me for now…”The popular artist added, “There’s no space or time in my life for that. My plate is quite full.Shakira continued, “My kids are my priority. And my career. Strangely enough, I’m in love with my career like I’ve never been in my life. I’m enjoying my time alone as well.”Just hours before the 2026 World Cup final began between Argentina and Spain, the popular Grammy winner Shakira opened up about how she will always cheer on Lionel Messi.A few weeks ago, as per PEOPLE, the Grammy winning artist extended her support to the football legend Lionel Messi as she wrote, “What @lionelmessi is doing is beyond extraordinary! It shows the values of a man who is deeply committed and disciplined, in challenging times, and all odds. Proving that a person is not defined by age or what others say.”Shakira also expressed how Lionel Messi’s wife, popular entrepreneur Antonela Roccuzzo stood by his side through all the tough times as she wrote, “I know that having a woman like @antonelaroccuzzo by his side gives him the strength and inspiration to prove that!”While the results for the 2026 World Cup Final were devastating for Argentina’s fans as Lionel Messi seemed heartbroken by the loss, the football legend has yet to issue a statement.For now, Shakira’s record breaking performance has impressed billions across the world as many are unable to believe that she is set to turn 50 years old next year.
Article Summary: Shakira had billions around the world dancing as her 2026 World Cup Final’s half time show broke viewership records. While the 49 year old Grammy winner looked ravishing on stage, all eyes were on her ex boyfriend and World Cup star Gerard Piqué as he watched her performance with their children. In an interview with The Times’ Blanca Schofield, Shakira said, “Oh no, no romance for me for now…”

Article Title: Zandvoort to Brands Hatch: Formula E drivers react to the 2026–27 season calendar
Article Text:
Formula E

Nyck De Vries, Taylor Barnard ready to race at Zandvoort



Antonio Felix Da Costa, Dan Ticktum eager to race in America



The Formula E 2026–27 season calendar was unveiled a few weeks ago amid much fanfare and is the longest in the history of the electric racing series. With 21 races set to be held across the globe, the calendar also features new venues, including Austin in the US and Zandvoort in the Netherlands. When the drivers were asked for their reaction to the new calendar, most shared their excitement about racing at Zandvoort. COTA in the US and Brands Hatch in the UK also received mentions from several drivers, who will be racing at those circuits for the first time.A video was shared on Formula E’s Instagram page with the caption: “What do the drivers make of our 2026/27 calendar? We caught up with them during track walk for their first reactions.”Taylor Barnard, who drives for DS Penske, shared his excitement about Zandvoort. He said, “Zandvoort's a great addition. I said when I first joined last year that actually I think it would be a good addition because of the braking zones and how much you get to recharge actually, so I think that was a good addition.”“Brands Hatch obviously, I've never raced there but that's a great addition. And starting and ending the season on night races is pretty cool as well, so looking forward to it,” he added.Mahindra Racing's Nyck de Vries also shared his excitement about Zandvoort. The Dutch driver said, “Yeah, it's very nice to get a chance to race at Zandvoort. I didn't race in the Netherlands since 2012, so it's been a while. I never got a chance to race at Zandvoort and always really loved the track. So yeah, looking forward to it.”Cupra Kiro driver Dan Ticktum is excited to race in America. He said, “COTA, Texas, very, very cool. Somewhere I've always wanted to go, wanted to do a lot more sightseeing in America, I've only really been to Miami and that's it more or less. It's cool, Route 66 is not bad. Yeah, I need to, at some point I will do an America tour, absolutely.”“Brands Hatch obviously very cool, fantastic, old-school, proper race circuit. It'll be great in the Gen4 car. I think now all the Goodwood stuff's been announced, I'm allowed to admit that I have driven the car. It is a very big step up and I think it's going to be, yeah, pretty special around Brands Hatch, that'll be cool,” he further said.Jaguar TCS Racing driver Antonio Felix da Costa is excited to race in the US. He said, “So I'm a big fan of racing in the States. I think they just get it and good entertainment and you know having kind of back-to-back races out there is going to be cool. So yeah, and Austin itself, I mean I love Texas, so going to Texas is going to be awesome.”Zane Maloney of Lola Yamaha ABT said about the calendar: “I think all the additions were really good. Brands Hatch - I won my British F4 title there on the GP circuit. I have good memories there. I’d like to go back next year; I can't wait. COTA - I watched F1 there a few years ago, and it’s an amazing track. I’m looking forward to it.”“What else is there? Zandvoort - I won there in F3. During the F3 season, or really throughout my junior career, it was probably my best track. So, it’s going to feel very different in an F1 car. But I’m looking forward to it. The banking will be amazing. And generally, going to these great facilities and F1 circuits is a good introduction to F1. And then having a bit of British history with Brands Hatch,” he added.The Formula E 2026–27 season will begin in December with the Jeddah double-header. It will be a night race and will mark the competition debut of the all-new GEN4 car.Also read: Formula E unveils biggest-ever calendar with 21 races and new race format for 2026–27
Article Summary: Formula E 2026–27 season calendar is the longest in the history of the electric racing series. 21 races are set to be held across the globe, including new venues, including Austin in the US and Zandvoort in the Netherlands. Drivers shared their excitement about racing at the new venues.

Article Title: Toronto Maple Leafs rookie Gavin McKenna tipped to match Matvei Michkov's impressive debut season
Article Text:
Gavin McKenna has been widely regarded as the top prospect in the 2026 class for several years (Image via Getty Images)

Toronto Maple Leafs' top overall pick Kevin McKenna to play on the top line of the club alongside Auston Matthews

The Toronto Maple Leafs' top overall pick, Kevin McKenna, is yet to play his first NHL game, but there are expectations that he could be playing on the top line this season alongside Auston Matthews, and he's expected to fill the void of Mitch Marner. NHL analysts believe that the highly touted winger could produce a rookie campaign comparable to the Philadelphia Flyers star Matvei Michkov, who delivered in her first season. It is to be noted that Gavin McKenna was selected by the Toronto Maple Leafs with the No. 1 pick in the 2026 NHL Draft and signed a three-year, entry-level contract. Toronto Maple Leafs' top overall pick Kevin McKenna is about to play on the top line of the club and is widely expected to compete on the top line of the club alongside Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews. While speaking on the possibility of playing with the top stars of the team, McKenna stated, "I’m going to have to prove myself to be able to play with a player like that. But that’s my goal,” McKenna said.On playing alongside Auston Matthews, he added, “I think he’s a special player. If I got the opportunity to play with him, I think my game is obviously being a playmaker, and he’s a shooter—I think we could complement each other pretty well.But like I said, I’ve got to work towards that, and that’s my goal.”Besides, according to The Athletic's Dom Luszczyszyn, McKenna has the potential to make an immediate impact in Toronto's lineup and could significantly improve the team's outlook for the upcoming season.The analyst projected McKenna's rookie performance to be close to Michkov's debut campaign, in which the Flyers forward recorded 26 goals and 37 assists for 63 points in 80 games.Analyzing Kevin McKenna’s potential, the NHL analyst wrote, “There are two things not included here: A new phenom and a new voice. Both Gavin McKenna and Jim Hiller have real potential to dramatically change Toronto’s outlook going into next season.”Luszczyszyn further wrote. “I have McKenna’s projected impact next season close to Matvei Michkov’s rookie season, while Hiller’s coaching impact with the Kings was surprisingly strong (and there’s no way he’s worse than Craig Berube). With those two in the fold, it’s difficult to see the Leafs falling to last year’s depths.” (source: Heavy.com)Luszczyszyn looks forward to an impressive season due to McKenna's arrival and new head coach Jim Hiller, as two major reasons for optimism after a disappointing 2025-26 campaign.According to PuckPedia, Gavin McKenna is signed to a 3-year, $3,225,000 contract with a cap hit of $1,075,000 per season, playing for the Toronto Maple Leafs. He will play till the end of the 2028-29 season, making McKenna a Restricted Free Agent. His base pay for the upcoming season is expected to be around $922,500.McKenna will certainly prove to be a good player due to his past performance. Previously, McKenna recorded 15 goals and 36 assists for 51 points in 35 games at Penn State last season and was a top-10 finalist for the Hobey Baker Award, presented annually to the top NCAA men's hockey player, as per the NHL.
Article Summary: Toronto Maple Leafs' top overall pick Kevin McKenna to play on the top line of the club alongside Auston Matthews. NHL analysts believe that the highly touted winger could produce a rookie campaign comparable to the Philadelphia Flyers star Matvei Michkov. McKenna recorded 15 goals and 36 assists for 51 points in 35 games at Penn State last season.

Article Title: Asmongold’s girlfriend Kaise finds cockroach head in streamer’s fridge during live stream
Article Text:
Image/X

Kaise spots cockroach head while checking Asmongold’s fridge

“very clean.”

Asmongold explains how the cockroach head may have ended up there

"roach snipping"

Asmongold’s girlfriend Kaise was left shocked after finding what appeared to be a cockroach head inside the popular streamer’s refrigerator during a recent livestream. Kaise, who has been staying at Asmongold’s home for several days, has already shared her reactions to different parts of the house. This time, while the pair were preparing food together, she noticed something unexpected inside the fridge. The moment quickly went viral, adding another chapter to the internet’s long-running discussions about Asmongold’s unusual living habits.The incident happened during Kaise’s Twitch livestream as she and Asmongold were in the kitchen preparing a budget meal that included a $2 steak. At first, Kaise was pleasantly surprised by the condition of the refrigerator and even said it lookedHowever, her opinion changed just moments later when she noticed something unusual inside the fridge. Looking closer, she suddenly exclaimed that she had found what looked like a cockroach head.Asmongold calmly confirmed her discovery and even laughed about how quickly she recognized it. Kaise was clearly surprised, while Asmongold appeared unfazed by the situation.The clip quickly spread across social media, with many viewers reacting to the strange discovery.Some found the moment funny because of Asmongold’s casual response, while others were shocked that an insect had remained inside the refrigerator unnoticed.After confirming that it was a cockroach head, Asmongold tried to explain how it might have gotten into the fridge. He joked about something he calledand guessed that he may have accidentally cut a cockroach in half at some point, with one part somehow ending up inside the refrigerator.He also admitted that he had no idea how long it had been there, suggesting it could even have been sitting in the fridge for years. Despite the discovery, Asmongold argued that the refrigerator was otherwise clean.Kaise eventually agreed that, apart from the dead insect, the fridge looked fairly tidy.The moment was especially surprising because only about a week earlier, Asmongold had said his home was finally free of cockroaches after major renovations. The streamer has long been known online for jokes and memes about the condition of his house, which previously became famous for its clutter and pest problems.Although the cockroach head created another viral moment, Asmongold insisted he had no idea it was inside the refrigerator until Kaise pointed it out during the livestream.As Kaise continues staying at Asmongold’s home, fans are eagerly watching to see what happens next. Whether she continues discovering unexpected surprises or simply gets used to Asmongold’s unique lifestyle, her visit has already provided viewers with several memorable and widely shared moments.

This time, while the pair were preparing food together, she noticed something unexpected inside the fridge. The moment quickly went viral, adding another chapter to the internet's long-running discussions about the popular streamer's unusual living habits.

Article Title: Nolan Wells update: Grieving mother shares chilling hate mail as FBI probes threats
Article Text:
Nolan Wells update: Grieving mother shares chilling hate mail as FBI probes threats (Image via Getty)

Christine Wonsley shares disturbing hate mail after Nolan Xavier Wells’ death

FBI confirms threats investigation as Nolan Xavier Wells’ family seeks answers

The family of Nolan Xavier Wells say they are now dealing with another painful chapter after receiving disturbing hate mail at their home while still waiting for answers about the 18-year-old’s death. Nolan disappeared during a July 4 trip to Horn Island, Mississippi, and his body was found two days later. At the same time, the FBI’s Jackson Field Office has confirmed it is helping investigate interstate threats made against people connected to the case. It has not said who received the threats or whether the letter sent to Nolan’s family is part of that federal investigation. Meanwhile, Nolan’s parents continue to question what happened during their son’s final hours.Christine Wonsley revealed on Facebook that someone mailed her family a photograph from a recent news conference after drawing on it and sending it without a return address. The picture showed Christine crying, with her husband Elmore Wonsley, civil rights leader Rev. Al Sharpton, and family attorney Ben Crump standing beside her.The sender drew arrows from Sharpton and Crump toward Christine and added several dollar signs, appearing to suggest they were supporting the family for money.The envelope was postmarked in Denver on July 15.Sharing a photo of the letter, Christine wrote, “Whoever sent this to my home, may the good Lord have mercy on your soul.”She added, “Bold enough to send this crap but not bold enough to list your return address.”Christine said her family was facing this because they simply wanted answers.“This is America where a grieving mother and father have to deal with this type of behavior because we asked a simple question of what happened to our son and accepted all the help we could get to find answers,” she wrote.She ended the post by saying, “Please go touch some grass.”The FBI’s Jackson Field Office confirmed it is assisting local authorities with threats linked to the case.“From day one, we have been supporting Jackson County as they’ve worked to gather information and find answers for the Wells Family and the community,” the agency said.Federal officials have not shared who received the threats or what they involved.Nolan’s friend Tracestin Shepherd previously told ABC News that people who were on the Horn Island trip had also received online threats.“It worries me for my friends. It worries me for my family,” Shepherd said.“We’re all young adults and we’re still learning this whole adulthood slash life thing.”He added, “We did no wrong here, and we don’t understand how we’re getting so much hate behind it.”Nolan, a football player at Southwest Mississippi Community College, traveled to Horn Island with friends for a Fourth of July gathering. His friends have said he stayed behind after meeting a young woman and did not have his cellphone when they left. His parents have repeatedly questioned that account.Jackson County Sheriff John Ledbetter previously said investigators had found no evidence of foul play and believed Nolan may have drowned. However, the official autopsy, toxicology results, and a separate examination requested by the family are still pending.Speaking last week, Ben Crump questioned that explanation, saying, “If he’s drowning, nobody sees him drown? Nobody offers assistance? Nobody tries to help?”Elmore Wonsley also rejected claims that his son chose to stay behind.“I know he wouldn’t do that. I preached that to him every day … You’re lying to me,” he told TheGrio.
Article Summary: FBI confirms threats investigation as Nolan Xavier Wells’ family seeks answers. Nolan disappeared during a July 4 trip to Horn Island, Mississippi, and his body was found two days later. FBI’s Jackson Field Office has confirmed it is helping investigate interstate threats made against people connected to the case.

Article Title: “There was real anxiety”: Taylor Swift was reportedly concerned about Blake Lively drama before tying the knot with Travis Kelce
Article Text:
Taylor Swift was reportedly concerned about Blake Lively drama before tying the knot with Travis Kelce.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift and Blake Lively were reportedly “anxious” about what comes out in the media, ahead of the pop star’s wedding to Travis Kelce

Travis Kelce gears up to bounce back on the field amid Taylor Swift’s drama with Ryan Reynolds and Blake Lively

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just had the wedding of the year in New York City’s Madison Square Garden but all eyes remain on how the billionaire pop star refused to invite two of her former best friends, the Hollywood power couple Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds. While fans remain curious about the reason, it seems Taylor Swift and Blake Lively’s friendship was full of anxiety.In a report by Rob Shuter’s Naughty but Nice, a source close to the pop star Taylor Swift had claimed that during Blake Lively’s lawsuit with Justin Baldoni, Swift and the actress were pretty worried about their texts being leaked.The source said, “There was real anxiety…They know once discovery starts, there’s no controlling what comes out.”As per Rob Shuter, the source added, “Taylor is very aware of this…If she’s mentioned anywhere in those communications, it could drag her into a legal and PR mess she never signed up for.”The source continued, “This is Blake’s worst nightmare…Discovery means texts, emails, DMs — everything could come out.”This has led many insiders to believe that this event was one of the major reasons why Taylor Swift’s decade long friendship with Blake Lively had deteriorated to such an extent that the actress was never invited to the billionaire pop star’s wedding to the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce.However, neither Taylor Swift nor the popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively has responded to the speculations yet as the two stars remain distant from one another.At this point in time, all eyes remain on what the “Life of a Showgirl” artist Taylor Swift chooses to do next in her life as many have criticised her for not calling Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds to her $20 million wedding in New York City.Taylor Swift’s husband, the Kansas City Chiefs’ popular tight end Travis Kelce has followed his wife’s suit and has kept himself away from all the mess related to Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds even though he had grown close to them too.The Kansas City Chiefs’ training camp is all set to begin from 29th July, weeks ahead of the new season, as Travis Kelce was recently spotted in Florida as he gears up to return to the field for his 15th season in the league.In the last few months, though there were many rumors about Travis Kelce opting for retirement, he has now credited Taylor Swift for motivating him to come back this season.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively were reportedly ‘anxious’ about what comes out in the media, ahead of the pop star’s wedding to Travis Kelce. The billionaire pop star refused to invite two of her former best friends, the Hollywood power couple Blake Livity and Ryan Reynolds.

Article Title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding took an unexpected turn after one guest's shocking surprise
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding continues to generate buzz after guest Jonathan Thomas revealed that Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. Many attendees initially believed his entrance was a joke before he delivered heartfelt vows filled with humor and sincere advice. Sandler even joked about the traditional "for rich or for poor" promise, making the ceremony one of the wedding's most memorable moments.

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding guests thought Adam Sandler's entrance was a prank

Adam Sandler balanced humor and heartfelt advice during the ceremony

The biggest surprise at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce 's star-studded wedding reportedly came long before the celebrations reached full swing. While guests expected an unforgettable ceremony, few saw Adam Sandler stepping into one of the most important roles of the day. According to a guest who attended the event, the actor's unexpected appearance caught nearly everyone off guard and quickly became one of the ceremony's most talked-about moments.New details continue to surface from Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding, even though the couple has yet to officially release photographs from the event. The ceremony, held at Madison Square Garden in New York City, reportedly welcomed close to 1,000 guests, bringing together celebrities, athletes, business leaders, and close friends for what attendees have described as a memorable celebration.One of those guests was Jonathan Thomas, President and Chief Executive Officer of American Century Investments. During an appearance on The Compound and Friends podcast, Thomas offered a rare glimpse into what happened during the ceremony, revealing that Adam Sandler served as the officiant.According to Thomas, Sandler's entrance immediately sparked laughter because many guests assumed it was part of a comedy routine rather than the beginning of the ceremony."He came down, everybody laughed and thought it was a joke at first."That initial surprise quickly gave way to an emotional ceremony. Thomas explained that Sandler spent considerable time speaking to the couple, blending his trademark humor with heartfelt advice that resonated throughout the venue.Thomas recalled that Sandler remained true to his personality while also making the occasion deeply personal. Rather than rushing through the formalities, the actor reportedly spoke for an extended period, shifting naturally between comedy and sincerity."He probably spoke for 20 or 30 minutes, vacillated between funny, very sincere, sang a few things."The actor also gave the traditional wedding vows his own humorous twist. Referring to the familiar promise that includes the words "For rich or for poor," Sandler jokingly said, "You're not going to have to worry about that."Beyond the laughs, Thomas said the ceremony carried a simple but meaningful message about marriage. According to him, Sandler encouraged the newlyweds to never lose sight of everyday affection, telling them, "Kiss each other every day, in the morning, at night after dinner, just kiss often."Although Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have remained private about many aspects of their wedding, stories like these continue to fuel fan interest. Every new account adds another layer to what has become one of the most closely followed celebrity weddings of the year.With official wedding photos still under wraps, moments shared by guests have become the only window into the celebration. Sandler's mix of humor, warmth, and personal advice appears to have left a lasting impression, turning what many first believed was a joke into one of the ceremony's most unforgettable highlights.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding continues to generate buzz. A guest revealed that Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony. Many attendees initially believed his entrance was a joke. Sandler delivered heartfelt vows filled with humor and sincere advice.

Article Title: Lamine Yamal’s girlfriend Inés García Santos sends heartwarming message as Spain claim World Cup victory over Argentina
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal and gir​lfriend Inés García Santos. Image via: fcbarcelona​

Lamine Yamal's girlfriend Inés García Santos celebrates Spain's World Cup triumph with touching post

Fans react to Inés García Santos' sweet message to Lamine Yamal

Spain defeated Argentina to secure their second World Cup victory

Lamine Yamal's girlfriend, Inés García Santos, posted an emotional Instagram message after Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in the World Cup final on Sunday at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.The 19-year-old winger helped lift Spain's second World Cup title, and García Santos celebrated the achievement publicly just hours after the final whistle. The moment added to a night already defined by Yamal's rise as one of the sport's brightest young stars.Inés García Santos shared the message on her Instagram account shortly after Spain's win, writing "Lo conseguiste. Enhorabuena mi amor, eres campeón del mundo 🤎," which translates to "You did it. Congratulations my love, you are the champion of the world." She also shared a photo of the couple showing their celebration.Yamal responded publicly with a short reply of his own, writing "te amo mi amor🤎," meaning "I love you my love."The two reportedly met on social media, and García Santos, a fashion and lifestyle influencer, has previously pushed back on assumptions about how the relationship started, insisting there was no cinematic origin story behind it.The couple went public in 2026, though the exact timeline of their relationship remains unclear.After the final whistle, Yamal was also seen celebrating on the pitch with his brother, Keyne, capping off a night that mixed personal milestones with a historic team achievement.The post drew a flood of comments from fans within the hour, many framing García Santos as a good-luck charm for Spain's run:lamineismo_: "lo dije antes del mundial, el amuleto Inés😍 gracias por acompañar a lamine en este fantástico camino Inés❤️" ("I said it before the World Cup, the amulet Inés, thank you for accompanying Lamine on this fantastic journey")mrmar0: "This Girl brought Luck to the Our Golden Boy ✨🏆"sxgarra10: "LA PAREJA DEL AÑO!!!!! ❤️❤️❤️" ("The couple of the year")berneese_: "You've touched more World Cup than Ronaldo, Go girl👏😍"khalid.trkmn: "Lamine yamal should marry her she brought a good luck for him"palmtreepancakes_14: "You guys look so cute together. Hope you guys get married when you're older."The romance played out against the backdrop of a tightly contested final. Luis de la Fuente's Spain dominated for long stretches, limiting Argentina to just two shots across 120 minutes before Ferran Torres broke the deadlock with a 106th-minute strike in extra time. Argentina played the closing stages a man down after midfielder Enzo Fernandez picked up a second yellow card in the 93rd minute.The win gives Spain their second World Cup title, coming 16 years after their first triumph in South Africa in 2010, when Andres Iniesta's extra-time winner sealed the trophy. De la Fuente praised Yamal's contribution afterward, saying the teenager "played great football that will help him to mature and be even a greater footballer than he already is."At 19 years and six days old, Yamal became one of the youngest players in history to win both the World Cup and the European Championship, having already lifted the Euros in 2024. He has now started 13 major tournament matches for Spain and won every one of them.
Article Summary: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in the World Cup final on Sunday. Lamine Yamal's girlfriend, Inés García Santos, posted an emotional message to him. She wrote "Lo conseguiste. Enhorabuena mi amor, eres campeón del Mundo" She also shared a photo of the couple showing their celebration.
